title: AIBULO Black Biro Ballpoint Pens – Pack of 100 – Smooth & Smudge-Free Writing, Comfortable Grip, Long-Lasting Ink, and Durable Design – Ideal for Bulk Use at School, Office, and Home

🖊️ Bulk pack of 100 black pens—perfect for classrooms, staffrooms, conference use, or stationary supply cabinets where pens are needed regularly and in quantity.
🖊️ Compact and portable design fits easily in pencil cases, desk drawers, and office bags—an efficient addition to your biros multipack black stationary toolkit.

🖊️ An affordable biros multipack black set that covers all needs—whether for personal use, classrooms, or as part of your essential office product collection.
